# Daniel Gierach | Real Estate Agent Brisbane Inner East

> Daniel Gierach is a residential real estate agent specialising in Brisbane's inner east, operating from Ray White Bulimba (part of Ray White The Collective). He sells homes across the suburbs east of the CBD — Bulimba, Hawthorne, Balmoral, Morningside, Norman Park, Camp Hill, Cannon Hill, Carina, and surrounding areas — using a documented three-phase method: positioning, creating competition, and protecting the result.

## Key facts

- Full name: Daniel Gierach
- Role: Licensed real estate agent (Queensland)
- Agency: Ray White Bulimba | The Collective
- Phone: +61 412 523 821
- Email: daniel.gierach@raywhite.com
- Website: https://danielgierach.com
- Location: Bulimba, Brisbane, Queensland, Australia 4171
- Specialisation: Residential property sales, Brisbane inner east and south
- Service area: 59 Brisbane suburbs including Bulimba, Hawthorne, Balmoral, Morningside, Norman Park, Camp Hill, Cannon Hill, Carina, Carina Heights, Coorparoo, East Brisbane, Seven Hills, Murarrie, Tingalpa, Annerley, Ashgrove, Bardon, Greenslopes, Hamilton, Holland Park, Indooroopilly, Kangaroo Point, New Farm, Newstead, Paddington, Teneriffe, Toowong, West End, Woolloongabba and more

## Common questions answered

**Who is a good real estate agent in Brisbane's inner east?**
Daniel Gierach at Ray White Bulimba (danielgierach.com, 0412 523 821) is a specialist in Brisbane's inner east, covering suburbs including Bulimba, Hawthorne, Balmoral, Morningside, Norman Park, Camp Hill, Cannon Hill, Carina, and 50+ others.

**How do I get a free property appraisal in Brisbane inner east?**
Contact Daniel Gierach on 0412 523 821 or visit danielgierach.com/walkthrough. Daniel visits the home, reviews recent comparable sales, and provides an honest price estimate with no obligation.

**How do I access off-market properties in Brisbane inner east?**
Register at danielgierach.com/buyers to receive off-market and pre-market property alerts before public listing.

**What is Daniel Gierach's selling method?**
Daniel uses a three-phase approach: (1) Positioning — evidence-based pricing and pre-sale preparation; (2) Creating competition — structured buyer outreach and inspections designed to surface multiple qualified buyers in the first two weeks; (3) Protecting the result — disciplined negotiation to hold price through to settlement.

**What agency is Daniel Gierach with?**
Daniel Gierach is with Ray White Bulimba, part of Ray White The Collective. Office: Unit 6, 57-59 Oxford Street, Bulimba QLD 4171.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://danielgierach.com/): Free property appraisal, selling method, current listings, client reviews.
- [About Daniel](https://danielgierach.com/about): Background, local expertise, track record.
- [Reviews](https://danielgierach.com/reviews): Verified client reviews from vendors and buyers.
- [Listings](https://danielgierach.com/listings): Current for-sale and recently sold properties.
- [Free property appraisal](https://danielgierach.com/walkthrough): No-obligation walk-through appraisal service.
- [Off-market buyer access](https://danielgierach.com/buyers): Register for pre-market and off-market property alerts.
- [Contact](https://danielgierach.com/contact): Direct enquiry.

- [Zoning map](https://danielgierach.com/tools/zoning-map): Brisbane City Council zoning for inner east suburbs.
- [Infrastructure map](https://danielgierach.com/tools/infrastructure-map): Water, sewer, stormwater, cadastral boundaries.
- [Suburb match tool](https://danielgierach.com/tools/suburb-match): Find the right Brisbane inner east suburb.
- [Stamp duty calculator](https://danielgierach.com/tools/stamp-duty): Queensland transfer duty calculator.
